sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_results(
			"SELECT *
			FROM $table
			WHERE $where
			ORDER BY date_enqueued ASC
			$limit;"
		)
$wpdb->get_results( "SELECT comment_approved, COUNT( * ) AS num_comments FROM {$wpdb->comments} WHERE comment_type NOT IN('order_note','action_log') GROUP BY comment_approved", ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_var(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT {$column_name} FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE ID=%d AND post_type=%s", // phpcs:ignore
				$action_id,
				self::POST_TYPE
			)
		)

$wpdb->get_var( // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.DirectQuery, WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.NoCaching
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT ID FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_type = %s AND CHAR_LENGTH(post_content) > %d LIMIT 1",
					$maximum_args_length,
					self::POST_TYPE
				)
			)

$wpdb->get_results(
			"SELECT *
			FROM $table
			WHERE $where
			ORDER BY date_enqueued ASC
			$limit;"
		)

$wpdb->query(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"DELETE FROM `$table` WHERE action = %s AND date < %s", // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.PreparedSQL.InterpolatedNotPrepared
				$action,
				$date
			)
		)

printf( '%1$s %2$s, Oldest: %3$s, Newest: %4$s%3$s%4$s', esc_html( $status_labels[ $status ] ), esc_html( number_format_i18n( $count ) ), esc_html( $oldest_and_newest[ $status ]['oldest'] ), esc_html( $oldest_and_newest[ $status ]['newest'] ) )
$wpdb->get_results( "SELECT comment_approved, COUNT( * ) AS num_comments FROM {$wpdb->comments} WHERE comment_type NOT IN('order_note','action_log') GROUP BY comment_approved", ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->query(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"UPDATE {$wpdb->posts} SET post_password = '' WHERE ID = %d AND post_type = %s",
				$action_id,
				self::POST_TYPE
			)
		)

$wpdb->get_var(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT {$column_name} FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE ID=%d AND post_type=%s", // phpcs:ignore
				$action_id,
				self::POST_TYPE
			)
		)

$wpdb->query(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"UPDATE {$wpdb->posts} SET menu_order = menu_order+1, post_status=%s, post_modified_gmt = %s, post_modified = %s WHERE ID = %d AND post_type = %s",
				self::STATUS_RUNNING,
				current_time( 'mysql', true ),
				current_time( 'mysql' ),
				$action_id,
				self::POST_TYPE
			)
		)

$wpdb->get_var( // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.DirectQuery, WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.NoCaching
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT ID FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_type = %s AND CHAR_LENGTH(post_content) > %d LIMIT 1",
					$maximum_args_length,
					self::POST_TYPE
				)
			)

printf( '

%s

', esc_html__( 'Action Scheduler migration in progress. The list of scheduled actions may be incomplete.', 'action-scheduler' ) )

esc_url( easy_wp_smtp()->get_upgrade_link( [ 'medium' => 'all-plugins', 'content' => 'Get Easy WP SMTP Pro' ] ) )

$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT id, content, initiator, event_type, created_at  FROM {$table} WHERE id IN ( {$placeholders} )", $ids )

$wpdb->prepare(
			'SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `%1$s` WHERE event_type = %2$d AND created_at >= "%3$s"',
			self::get_table_name(),
			Event::TYPE_ERROR,
			gmdate( WP::datetime_mysql_format(), $timestamp )
		)

wp_kses( sprintf( /* translators: %s - search term. */ __( 'Search results for %s', 'easy-wp-smtp' ), sanitize_text_field( wp_unslash( $_GET['s'] ) ) // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.NonceVerification.Recommended ), [ 'strong' => [] ] )

wp_kses( sprintf( /* translators: %1$s - number of debug events found; %2$s - filtered type. */ _n( 'Found %1$s %2$s event', 'Found %1$s %2$s events', absint( $table->get_pagination_arg( 'total_items' ) ), 'easy-wp-smtp' ), absint( $table->get_pagination_arg( 'total_items' ) ), $type !== false && isset( $table->get_types()[ $type ] ) ? $table->get_types()[ $type ] : '' ), [ 'strong' => [], ] )

In order to work properly, the custom tables should be created, and it seems they are missing. Please try to create the missing DB tables by clicking on this link. If this issue persists, please contact our support and provide the error message below:', 'easy-wp-smtp' ), esc_url( $create_missing_tables_url ), esc_url( $contact_support_url ) ), [ 'a' => [ 'href' => [], 'target' => [], 'rel' => [], ], ] )

wp_kses( /* translators: %1$s - SMTP host address, %2$s - SMTP port, %3$s - SMTP encryption. */ __( 'Contact your web hosting provider and ask them to verify your server can connect to %1$s on port %2$s using %3$s encryption. $wpdb->prepare(
			'SELECT COUNT(1) IndexIsThere
				FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATISTICS
				WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()
				AND table_name = %s
				AND index_name = %s',
			$table,
			$index
		)

wp_kses( /* translators: %1$s - URL to ElasticEmail.com site. */ __( 'Elastic Email is a cloud-based platform designed for email marketing, offering features for campaign management, email automation, transactional messages, and detailed analytics, suitable for businesses of any size.

wp_kses( sprintf( /* translators: %1$s - Settings Page URL; %2$s - The aria label; %3$s - The text that will appear on the link. */ __( 'Easy WP SMTP is using custom database tables for some of its features. In order to work properly, the custom tables should be created, and it seems they are missing. Please try to %3$s. If this issue persists, please contact our support.', 'easy-wp-smtp' ), esc_url( $missing_tables_create_link ), esc_attr__( 'Go to Easy WP SMTP settings page.', 'easy-wp-smtp' ), esc_attr__( 'create the missing DB tables by clicking on this link', 'easy-wp-smtp' ) ), [ 'a' => [ 'href' => [], 'rel' => [], 'target' => [], 'aria-label' => [], ], ] )

$wpdb->prepare(
				"DELETE FROM `$table` WHERE action = %s AND date < %s", // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.PreparedSQL.InterpolatedNotPrepared
				$action,
				$date
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"
INSERT INTO $table_name ( $column_sql )
SELECT $placeholder_sql FROM DUAL
WHERE ( $where_clause ) IS NULL",
			$values
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"
SELECT action_id FROM $table_name
WHERE status IN ( $pending_status_placeholders )
AND hook = %s
AND `group_id` = %d
",
			array_merge(
				$pending_statuses,
				array(
					$data['hook'],
					$data['group_id'],
				)
			)
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT a.*, g.slug AS `group` FROM {$wpdb->actionscheduler_actions} a LEFT JOIN {$wpdb->actionscheduler_groups} g ON a.group_id=g.group_id WHERE a.action_id=%d",
				$action_id
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
					"UPDATE {$wpdb->actionscheduler_actions} SET status = %s WHERE action_id IN {$query_in}", // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.PreparedSQL.InterpolatedNotPrepared
					$parameters
				)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT action_id, scheduled_date_gmt FROM {$wpdb->actionscheduler_actions} WHERE claim_id = %d ORDER BY priority ASC, attempts ASC, scheduled_date_gmt ASC, action_id ASC",
			$claim_id
		)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT post_password) FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_password != '' AND post_type = %s AND post_status IN ('in-progress','pending')",
				array( self::POST_TYPE )
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT ID, post_date_gmt FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_type = %s AND post_password = %s",
				array(
					self::POST_TYPE,
					$claim_id,
				)
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"UPDATE {$wpdb->posts} SET post_password = '' WHERE ID = %d AND post_type = %s",
				$action_id,
				self::POST_TYPE
			)
$wpdb->prepare( "UPDATE {$wpdb->posts} SET post_status = %s WHERE ID = %d AND post_type = %s", self::STATUS_FAILED, $action_id, self::POST_TYPE )

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT {$column_name} FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE ID=%d AND post_type=%s", // phpcs:ignore
				$action_id,
				self::POST_TYPE
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"UPDATE {$wpdb->posts} SET menu_order = menu_order+1, post_status=%s, post_modified_gmt = %s, post_modified = %s WHERE ID = %d AND post_type = %s",
				self::STATUS_RUNNING,
				current_time( 'mysql', true ),
				current_time( 'mysql' ),
				$action_id,
				self::POST_TYPE
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT ID FROM {$wpdb->posts} WHERE post_type = %s AND CHAR_LENGTH(post_content) > %d LIMIT 1",
					$maximum_args_length,
					self::POST_TYPE
				)
